column1: Regular communication to your learners in line with key seasonal initiatives celebrated through your business is a best practice method to help you sustain learners engagement and value.
We'd like to help you with this and have mapped out some key dates through 2025 along with relevant courses you can leverage on each of these dates
We'd encourage you to get creative here and consider what these dates mean to your employees, organisation and industry and adjust any course suggestions as necessary.
There is no right or wrong way to use this document, some examples include:
Using the recommendation feature via LinkedIn Learning to recommend a course, collection or Learning path to all of your learners
LinkedIn Learning Hub clients can leverage the campaign banner to promote a course, collection or Learning Path via the learner homepage
Cascade this document to your internal comms team - **where possible we recommend you leverage the SSO links to share this content
Create your own comms template using GenAI - this document contains, dates, descriptors and courses. GenAI can help you craft a custom message to your organisation.
Chat with your LinkedIn account team about proactively creating collections or learning paths that align to this calendar
